var PIX_AUDIT=false;try{PIX_AUDIT=location.search.indexOf('pixaudit')>=0;}catch(e){}  // CI: podpis pikselowy (downsample 64×40) do <pre id=pixaudit>
function W(u,h){return lp(5,a0+u*aw,bd,base+h*hgt);}    // u∈[0,1] poziom, h∈[0,1] „cena”
if(cv.width===bw&&cv.height===bh)return;  // backing-store bez zmian → nie resetuj kanwy/kamery (anty-migotanie)

if(p.type==='setupR0')return 'R0 |close[t0] − L_opp(t0)| one geometric risk unit TP = close[t0] + 1·R0';

else if(p.type==='label'||p.type==='setupTP')PANEL.show('Label Y (triple barrier)','TP → Y=1: first close ≥ close[t0]+R0
SL → Y=0: first close pierces L_opp(t) — moving line (spec §5, decision v1.2)
